methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: Underlying ERC-20 asset held by each WildcatMarket (IERC20(asset).balanceOf(market))
Protocol fees accrued in-market (MarketState.accruedProtocolFees) and withdrawable to feeRecipient via collectFees()
Lender positions represented by rebasing market ERC-20 balances (scaled balances normalized by scaleFactor)
Pending/paid withdrawal liquidity reserves: normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals (paid but unexecuted) and liquidity reserved for pending/unpaid batches
Sanctioned-user escrow balances held in per-(borrower,account,asset) WildcatSanctionsEscrow contracts
Origination fees paid at market deployment (potentially in arbitrary ERC-20 originationFeeAsset) to hooks-template feeRecipient
state_assets: MarketState struct packed across storage slots: isClosed, maxTotalSupply, accruedProtocolFees, normalizedUnclaimedWithdrawals, scaledTotalSupply, scaledPendingWithdrawals, pendingWithdrawalExpiry, isDelinquent, timeDelinquent, protocolFeeBips, annualInterestBips, reserveRatioBips, scaleFactor, lastInterestAccruedTimestamp
Withdrawal system state: WithdrawalData _withdrawalData including batches[expiry], unpaidBatches FIFO set/queue, accountStatuses[expiry][account]
Hooks configuration (immutable HooksConfig hooks): hook address + per-hook enable flags
Factory template registries: _hooksTemplates array, _templateDetails mapping, _marketsByHooksTemplate mapping, getHooksTemplateForInstance mapping
Transient deployment parameters in HooksFactory: _tmpMarketParameters (TransientBytesArray) storing TmpMarketParameterStorage for market constructor to read
Sanctions Sentinel state: sanctionOverrides[borrower][account] and tmpEscrowParams (borrower, account, asset)
privilege_assets: Market borrower privilege (WildcatMarketBase.borrower immutable) controlling: borrow(), closeMarket(), rescueTokens(), setMaxTotalSupply(), setAnnualInterestAndReserveRatioBips()
Market factory privilege (WildcatMarketBase.factory immutable) controlling: setProtocolFeeBips() on market
Fee recipient address (immutable) receiving protocol fees via collectFees()
ArchController ownership (Solady Ownable) controlling borrower/controller-factory/controller/market registries and asset blacklist
ArchController SphereX operator/admin role (SphereXConfig) controlling updateSphereXEngineOnRegisteredContracts() and SphereX engine config
HooksFactory onlyArchControllerOwner gate for managing hooks templates (add/update/disable)
Sanctions override privilege: any caller can overrideSanction/removeSanctionOverride for themselves as 'borrower' key (msg.sender)
SphereX engine authority over SphereXProtectedRegisteredBase-derived contracts (guards via sphereXGuardExternal modifiers and engine allowlists)
reputation_assets: Lender access/eligibility enforced by hooks (onDeposit/onTransfer/onQueueWithdrawal/onExecuteWithdrawal) affecting who can participate
Borrower reputation/market integrity tied to reserve ratio, delinquency tracking, and penalty APR behavior
Governance/registry trust: ArchController sets approved borrowers, controller factories, and blacklisted assets
Sanctions-compliance status and overrides impacting protocol legitimacy and user accessibility

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: WildcatMarket inherits WildcatMarketBase + WildcatMarketConfig + WildcatMarketToken + WildcatMarketWithdrawals (all extend WildcatMarketBase). WildcatMarketBase inherits SphereXProtectedRegisteredBase + ReentrancyGuard + IMarketEventsAndErrors. HooksFactory inherits SphereXProtectedRegisteredBase + ReentrancyGuard + IHooksFactory. WildcatArchController inherits SphereXConfig + Solady Ownable. WildcatSanctionsEscrow and WildcatSanctionsSentinel are standalone (Sentinel depends on Chainalysis list, Escrow depends on Sentinel).
external_dependencies: SphereX protection framework: SphereXProtectedRegisteredBase/SphereXConfig/ISphereXEngine integration and sphereXGuardExternal modifiers
Custom libs: MathUtils, SafeCastLib, FeeMath, LibERC20, BoolUtils, Withdrawal, FunctionTypeCasts, LibStoredInitCode, TransientBytesArray
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: No proxy/upgrade pattern detected for markets: WildcatMarket uses constructor with immutable parameters, and state is stored directly (non-upgradable). HooksFactory/ArchController/Sanctions contracts also appear non-proxied. System includes SphereX engine address updates on registered contracts (not upgradeability, but mutable security middleware).
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Primary roles: (1) ArchController owner (Ownable) manages registries and blacklist; (2) SphereX operator/admin (via SphereXConfig modifiers) manages SphereX engine updates; (3) HooksFactory onlyArchControllerOwner manages templates; (4) Registered borrowers (in ArchController) can deploy hooks instances and markets via HooksFactory; (5) Per-market borrower (immutable) controls borrowing and market parameter setters; (6) Per-market factory (immutable, deployer HooksFactory) can push protocol fee changes via setProtocolFeeBips; (7) Sentinel sanction overrides keyed by borrower=msg.sender allow that borrower to override sanctions for accounts in their markets.

upgradeability_surface.notes: Non-upgradeable market deployed via CREATE2 with constructor; uses immutables for critical addresses and SphereX base init in constructor.
Direct storage (MarketState/_accounts/_withdrawalData). No proxy initializer; SphereX base is initialized in constructor via __SphereXProtectedRegisteredBase_init.
Adds allowance mapping on top of MarketBase inheritance; no upgrade mechanism.
Uses same MarketBase storage; no proxy.
Uses same MarketBase storage; no proxy.
Factory is non-upgradeable; uses transient storage (tstore/tload) for passing constructor parameters to newly deployed markets.
Non-upgradeable; deploys escrow contracts via CREATE2; maintains sanction override mappings.
Non-upgradeable escrow; constructor reads tmpEscrowParams from sentinel.
